'''鈭歯-f-p-s''' ('''kanafpesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mocap|mocap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mocap|mocap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-f-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanafpesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinafpesoko|thinafpesoko]] || [[word:jinafpesoko|jinafpesoko]] || [[word:shinafpesoko|shinafpesoko]] || [[word:kinafpesoko|kinafpesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
